profile_backed_target.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-dispatch-profile-ts1 cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
profile_backed_target.rank: top unclaimed non-linalg row after vmap_eigh/vmap_svd/vmap_qr were avoided for peer linalg claims

candidate_rebench.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-dispatch-dot-after-ts1 cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_dot_i64/paired_vectors --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

one_lever: Bypass generic BatchTrace dispatch only for the exact binary Dot jaxpr with two DType::I64 rank-2 tensors, both vmap axes 0, no out_axes override, and no transform tail.
non_perf_hygiene: Updated one fj-dispatch test assertion from len % stride == 0 to len.is_multiple_of(stride), preserving the n > 0 guard and satisfying current clippy all-targets.

isomorphism.ordering: Rows are emitted in ascending batch index order. Within each row, products are accumulated in ascending kk order, matching the paired-vector dot path.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: Not applicable: dot has no ties, sorting, equality-based winner selection, or conflict resolution.
isomorphism.floating_point: Excluded by guard: the direct path accepts only DType::I64 tensors. All F32, F64, and complex dot cases fall through to the existing path unchanged.
isomorphism.integer_overflow: Uses wrapping_mul followed by wrapping_add, preserving the existing I64 dot overflow semantics and the prior paired-dot parity test vector.
isomorphism.rng: Unchanged: no RNG primitive, seed, key, or state is read or written.
isomorphism.fallback: Any non-exact jaxpr, non-tensor input, non-I64 dtype, non-rank-2 input, shape mismatch, length mismatch, non-axis-0 vmap, out_axes override, or non-I64 literal storage returns None and executes the previous generic path.

validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-dispatch-dot-test-ts1 cargo test -p fj-dispatch dispatch_vmap_dot_i64_paired_vectors_wraps_like_lax -- --nocapture
validation.result: passed 1 focused dispatch-level wrapping parity test

validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-dispatch-dot-tests-ts1 cargo test -p fj-dispatch dot_paired -- --nocapture

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-dispatch-check-ts1 cargo check -p fj-dispatch --all-targets

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-dispatch-clippy2-ts1 cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

validation.result: exit 0 for both; critical issues 0; warnings are existing file-scope inventory

notes: Higher linalg rows were not claimed because frankenjax-axevw and frankenjax-p1vbf were already in progress under a peer agent.
The committed runtime lever is entirely safe Rust and does not link C BLAS, MKL, or XLA.
